series_metadata.series_description: The board receives BCI&I and FBI records checks per section 4757.101 of the Revised Code. These records are invalid one year and a day after receipt.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: One year or after licensure is awarded. Information from reports are noted in the licensing system. ; Electronic: One year after date of receipt for files received by FTP download., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
